item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 41min Rare that you go into Sunday with two players T3 and think you've no chance, but that is
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 41min Rare that you go into Sunday with two players T3 and think you've no chance, but that is the unavoidable conclusion when first is a course-specialist, in-form, world-class defending champion, and second is Scheffler. Quite freeing. And I felt the same on Sunday of the Hero. 2 6 1 mil

item.title:
BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 40min En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf Satisfaction scale for the record:
0 places = why always
item.description:
Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 40min En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf Satisfaction scale for the record:
0 places = why always me 1 place = was it worth it meh but fine 2 places = delighted with that thank you Winner = best day ever given that Arsenal won 2 693

item.title: mikeclaytongolf: Ben Coley reposteó Mike Clayton @mikeclaytongolf · 7h En respuesta a @MikeCarlton01 This is good De australiangolfdiges
item.description: Ben Coley reposteó Mike Clayton @mikeclaytongolf · 7h En respuesta a @MikeCarlton01 This is good De australiangolfdigest.com.au 1 5 1 mil

item.title: TronCarterNLU: Tron Carter @TronCarterNLU · 6h I would watch this every week from Si Woo and Manny. It’s 15 minutes of joy on the tour’
item.description:
Tron Carter @TronCarterNLU · 6h I would watch this every week from Si Woo and Manny. It’s 15 minutes of joy on the tour’s YT. Cita PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 17 abr. Mic’d up Si Woo Kim is pure entertainment
Everything you didn’t hear from Si Woo Kim in Chasing Sunday: Unheard, now on PGA TOUR YouTube. 2 4 259 67 mil

item.title: PGATOURComms: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 6h Hole locations for the final round of the RBC Heritage 1 8 54 13 mil
item.description: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 6h Hole locations for the final round of the RBC Heritage 1 8 54 13 mil
